feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: The condition class in S4 HANA is not created BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 but it is in R3
entry.content:
Good morning everyone.
Currently, my client is in the process of migrating to S/4HANA. We have a program Z that creates sales orders (VA01) through the BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2. The program fills in all the required fields of the BAPI (it enters four condition classes per item), but after creating the order, it does so without the ZCGM condition, which is manually configured as mandatory for a specific order class, ZC06. If I create the order manually using VA01, SAP prompts me to enter the ZCGM condition class since it is mandatory, and it creates the other classes without problems.

The curious thing here is that this same BAPI is used in R/3, and the same fields are filled in, but the order is created using the ZCGM condition class.

I have seen that at the configuration level, everything is OK in both R/3 and S/4HANA. I performed standard debugging on the BAPI and verified that the condition is never lost, but for some reason, it's not created in S4 HANA when other condition classes are added. If only the ZCGM class is used, it creates it without problems, but the client needs to add other condition classes as well.

S4 HANA order created through BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2  (The ZCGM condition is not present.)

Order created in R3 with the same data and using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2( if created with condition ZCGM )

 

Data that I enter in conditions for the BAPI in both S4 HANA and R3 environments.

We have also tried setting a value in LOGICAL_SWITCH-PRICING but it doesn't work for us in S4 HANA either.

entry.title: Custom ATP checking rule for deliveries VL01N
entry.content:
I would like to ship a quality rejected material to customer from restricted status. But the same material can be shipped to customer from unrestricted if its good. 
MMBE
But the checking rule B is always considered in delivery VL01N which is used for good material.

Is it possible to add other checking rule to consider the restricted stock without changing the checking group in material master. 
May be different delivery

entry.title: INC44943891 - SWP - Rebate condition records need to remove in KOTE530
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Issue is with the rebate conditions maintained for the Agreement 14241, Business User has wrongly maintained the Rebate condition records for Sales Office - 31YG, Customer - ZD158875 and Selling reporting code.

Now we want to remove these condition records from the system, please guide us how to remove these conditions permanently from the Table KOTE530.

Could you please guide us how to remove these condition records.

Regards,

Syamkiran K

entry.title: Restriction on Batch Determination Based on Manufacturing Date
entry.content:
We are currently operating on SAP S/4HANA 2021, where the business process allows goods issue using movement type 601 through sales orders and outbound deliveries.

However, a system inconsistency has been observed in the batch determination process. Specifically, the system is allowing the creation of sales orders and delivery documents with batch selection even when the batch manufacturing (production) date is later than the transaction date.

For example, a sales transaction is being processed on 01.02.2026, whereas the selected batch has a manufacturing date of 04.02.2026. This indicates that the system is permitting the allocation and picking of stock that is not yet produced, which is logically and operationally incorrect.

This gap can lead to:

  • Incorrect inventory commitments
  • Compliance and audit issues
  • Misalignment between physical stock and system stock
  • Potential financial and legal discrepancies

Business Requirement:

The system must enforce a control to ensure that:

  • Batch determination should not consider or propose any batch where the manufacturing date is greater than the sales order date or delivery creation date.
  • During sales order creation (VA01) and delivery processing (VL01N / batch picking), such future-dated batches must be automatically excluded from selection.
  • The restriction should work consistently across all relevant processes including ATP, batch determination, and goods issue.

Expected Outcome:

  • Only batches with a manufacturing date less than or equal to the transaction date should be eligible for selection.
  • The system should prevent users from manually overriding and selecting future-dated batches.
  • This validation should ensure alignment with actual production availability and maintain audit compliance.

entry.title: Requirement for Complete Delivery per Sales Order for a particular customer
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement to ensure that deliveries to the customer are completed in a single shipment.

For example, if a sales order contains two line items with quantities of 5 and 6, the customer does not want partial deliveries. Instead, a single delivery should be created only when both line items (5 and 6 quantities) can be fulfilled together.

I am aware of the “Complete Delivery” indicator in the customer master, and I have already enabled it. However, this setting appears to control completion at the line item level only. Currently, the system still allows the creation of separate deliveries for individual line items, even though it prevents reducing the requested quantity within a line item.

Could you please advise how we can enforce complete delivery at the entire sales order level, so that delivery creation is only possible when all line items are ready?

Thanks in advance for your guidance.

Best regards,
Aravind

entry.title: Inter company IC billing not getting created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue, while trying to create IC billing with refer to required delivery.

Getting error as '' Sales organization is not defined''. We have attached the error screenshots.

Kindly check and help us with the solution of the issue.

entry.title: Pricing Procedure Condition Type Value Posting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement to post values of some conditions in pricing procedure to customer account debit. I have tried it using account keys and accruals but unable to do so. can anyone guide in this ?

Please find attached pictures for reference. I tried creating separate accruals key and maintain recon. account but system is not generating accounting document in that scenario as well.

entry.title: Standard Access Sequence
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am new to consulting field, please help me to get some details regarding Access sequence.

Above screenshot is a JGSO Access sequence in V/07 screen, there are multiple condition tables are assigned. I want to know few details

1. JGSO access Sequence is SAP India Standard or customised

2. the said 4 condition table is SAP India standard which is automatically fetched in V/07 against JGSO or these are also manually created. 

3. Is there any Table to check the Created by User name for Condition table, Access sequence and Condition table?

entry.title: Cancellation of billing invoice even it is referenced to create credit memo
entry.content: User has created billing invoice, then created credit memo with reference to billing invoice after that system allows to cancel billing invoice without cancelling credit memo & note. This is the SAP standard behaviour but how we can stop this process that if any invoice has been referenced to create credit memo then system will not allow to cancel billing invoice until & unless all the document get reversed.

entry.title: Cancellation of billing invoice even it is referenced to create credit memo
entry.content: User has created billing invoice, then created credit memo with reference to billing invoice after that system allows to cancel billing invoice without cancelling credit memo & note. how we can stop this process that if any invoice has been referenced to create credit memo then system will not allow to cancel billing invoice until & unless all the document get reversed.

entry.title: Distribute Downpayment equally when not cleared
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement in our project. We are using billing plans in our project and the requirement is to distribute downpayment amount equally among all invoices even when the downpayment is not cleared. This solution is required in S/4 Hana public cloud.

For example, A sales order is created for £1000 and amount is as per the below table. Downpayment request was created for £100 but customer hasn't made any payment. Now, there is a need to create 1st milestone and requirement is to takeway £25 and bill customer for £225. Ideally, when the downpayment is cleared, a new line appear as a second line in the 1st milestone as "Downpayment settlement" but in this case this second line is not appearing as downpayment is not cleared. Please suggest.

Billing Plan Line NumberBilling plan RelevancyAmountTo be billed to customerAmount Cleared?
1Downpayment£100£100No
21st Milestone£250£250 - £25 = £225 
32nd Milestone£250£250 - £25 = £225 
43rd Milestone£250£250 - £25 = £225 
54th Milestone£250£250 - £25 = £225

entry.title: Business maintain condition contract BUT do not want Settlement process,
entry.content:
Hi All

Business wants to go for Settlement management ( Sales commission Condition Contract)  but they do not want to use the Settlement process. They want to use the existing settlement process.

They want to use the condition contract to only maintain the Rebate conditions and flow them into sales order and billing document. 

Just trying to understand whether this can be achieved without any issues.. Not sure what are the challenges from the settlement documents outstanding for the business volume generated.

What settings needs to be done in settlement document type so it will not show any type of outstanding.. 

thanks

Sri

entry.title: creating proforma in.for free of charge but system shows 000010 the item is not relevant for billing
entry.content:
hii experts

first i created free of charge document type copied from FD 

then i created item category copied from KLN

then i created delivery type copied from LF

then i created proforma invoice type copied for F8 

and after the PGI process i go to create proforma invoice but system shows 000010 the item is not relevant for billing 

please help to solve this problem i have an interview call i want to practice very hard to get job

thanks and regards,

entry.title: Business transaction "unlock" in SD status profile does not work for sales order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have customized a status profile for sales order where I want a user status to be set by the system when the business transaction "unlock" (BUNL) is executed. I have assigned the profile to my sales document type and the position.

I have activated both object types for sales order header and sales order item but when I try to test this by clearing an invoice block, the system does not set the desired user status, neither for the head nor for the position data.

Maybe the business transaction "unlock" means something different in regard of the sales order but I couldn't find further documentation. 

Thanks for help!

entry.title: After SO change, credit block triggered even within OVA8 time limit
entry.content:
After billing date + Settlement date for deadline were changed in a sales order, the Overall Status of Credit Checks indicator was moved automatically to "blocked", triggering a credit case

the elapsed time between this change and the latest credit release is well within the number of days specified in OVA8

Can you advise if this is standard behavior, please?

entry.title: How to check connection between sales order item category and documents generated in CBC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In SAP Public Cloud, there are some item categories in sales order that will generate relevant documents.

Example:
- Item category CB1 will generate purchase requisition
- Item category TAD will generate solution order

I would like to know how to check which item categories will generate which type of documents. I checked in CBC but found none.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD Sales 
I really appreciate.
Best regards.

entry.title: Which BADI is used to add sold to party bp in condition parameter for order output
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to BRF+ output determination for sales document. i am not able to find sold to party/ BP field in OPD context object list. i have searched the forum and found that the sold field can be added via BADi and enhancement. however which badi is not suggested. i am not able to find a suitable badi for adding this field. the version that we are using is S4H on-premise 2025. can any one please suggest the badi for adding the sold to field for output determination. 

 

Thanks

Ashwini

entry.title: Sale order is unable to delete.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Sale order is unable to delete in SAP Quality system.

Regards

Thanigai

entry.title: Automatic Stages on Freight Order TM
entry.content:
Dear Guru's

Can the TM in SAP S/4HANA RISE automatically fill stages for multidrop with multiple transporter? Because in LE-TRA we can set stages in the route configuration with multiple transporter

Thanks

entry.title: I accidentally added two options (UW00 & UE00) to the distribution chain, how to delete one of them
entry.content: I need help for I accidentally added two options (UW00 & UE00) to the distribution chain, but one of them should be in the next position. There's a delete button, but it's grayed out and unusable. How can I delete it? pls help me ，thank you very much
